memoryInject.description: Inject HOT memory into agent context on prompt build

maxInjectedChars.description: Max characters for injected memory context

autoCapture.description: Enable automatic memory capture after agent exchanges

captureFrequency.description: How often to capture: every exchange or only significant ones

captureMinTurns.description: Minimum exchange turns before capture is attempted

captureMinSignificance.description: Minimum significance score (0.0-1.0) for LLM-extracted items to be captured

showMemorySources.description: Show memory source footnotes in agent responses

showCaptureConfirm.description: Show capture confirmations in agent responses

recallMinScore.description: Minimum score for a recall result to be considered relevant (default: 0.7)

memoryInject.label: Memory Injection
memoryInject.description: Inject relevant memories into agent context before each prompt (recommended: on)

maxInjectedChars.label: Max Injected Characters
maxInjectedChars.description: Maximum characters of memory context injected per prompt (recommended: 4000)

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.description: Automatically capture significant exchanges as memories (recommended: on)

showMemorySources.label: Memory Source Footnotes
showMemorySources.description: Show which memories were used in agent responses (recommended: on)

showCaptureConfirm.label: Capture Confirmations
showCaptureConfirm.description: Show confirmation when exchanges are saved to memory (recommended: on)

recallMode.label: Recall Mode
recallMode.description: How memories are retrieved: query (semantic) or list (tier-based)
